XACT_PARAMETER_ENTRY

typedef struct _XACT_PARAMETER_ENTRY{
    WORD wScope;
    WORD wFlags;
    WORD wCategoryIndex;
    WORD wStepCount;
    FLOAT flStepSize;
    FLOAT flStartValue;
    union {
        PXACTSOUNDCUE pSoundCue;
        PXACTSOUNDBANK pSoundBank;
    } u;
    PCSTR pszFriendlyName;
} XACT_PARAMETER_ENTRY, *PXACT_PARAMETER_ENTRY;

Members

wScope
Indicates the scope of the control. See the XACT_PARAMETER_CONTROL_SCOPE section for valid values.
wFlags
Flags indicating the parameter entry behavior. Can be zero or the following:
Value Description
XACT_FLAG_PARAMETER_CONTROL_IMMEDIATE Indicates that the RPC entry's change should be applied before SetParameterControl returns, rather than deferring it to the next XACTEngineDoWork call.

This flag is specific to each entry in the XACT_PARAMETER_CONTROL_DESC entry array, so only those entries with the flag set will be processed immediately.

If this flag is specified and the step count is greater than zero, only the first step will be processed immediately. The remaining steps will not be processed until XACTEngineDoWork is called.
wCategoryIndex
Value indicating the category index to use (see the IXACTEngine::GlobalPause and IXACTEngine::SetMasterVolume pages for examples). The wScope member must be set to eXACTParameterControlScope_Global when specifying this index.
wStepCount
Number of steps applied to the control. The value for this parameter is valid as long as flStartValue + flStepSize * wStepCount falls within the range of 0 to 1.
flStepSize
Indicates the amount to adjust the control per step. The valid range for this parameter is between -1.0 and 1.0, inclusive.
flStartValue
Indicates the starting value of the control. The valid range for this parameter is between 0.0 and 1.0, inclusive.
pSoundCue
A pointer to a valid sound cue instance. This value must be specified if the wScope value is eXACTParameterControlScope_SoundCueInstance.
pSoundBank
Not currently supported.
pszFriendlyName
String value representing the friendly name of the control as defined in the XACT authoring tool by the sound designer or composer. The name is case-sensitive. Names for sliders used for slider-driven variations are defined in Xact.h as follows:
#define XACT_PARAMETER_CONTROL_MASTER_VOLUME    "=MasterVolume"
#define XACT_PARAMETER_CONTROL_SOUND_VARIATION  "=SoundVariation"
#define XACT_PARAMETER_CONTROL_WAVE_VARIATION   "=WaveVariation"

Remarks

Ramped parameter controls (where wStepCount is greater than 0) are processed during calls to XACTEngineDoWork. So to get a rough idea of the duration of the change, it would be calculated as wStepCount * DoWorkCallInterval, where DoWorkCallInterval is how often XACTEngineDoWork is called on average.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xact.h.

See Also

XACT_PARAMETER_CONTROL_DESC, SetParameterControl
